name: Vertex Pharmaceuticals
analysis: VRTX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at $464.9800. Trade idea: entry $488.3100, stop $429.4620, target $664.8540 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
